creator: hirotaka.niitsuma@gmail.com
text:
I fund this update for devel/antlr ports

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/155062

It is seem to antlr2 will update to antlr3.
But antlr2 and 3 does not have compatibility. 
There are different. Detail of the difference is  http://www.antlr.org/wiki/display/ANTLR3/Migrating+from+ANTLR+2+to+ANTLR+3.
(Thus Struts still use antlr2)

Plz dont update antlr2 to antlr3, instead, split antlr2 and antlr3 ports
